variant: make me a checklist for my AM skincare routine

request.message: make me a checklist for my AM skincare routine

response_body.response:
since you have dry skin and texture concerns, here's your am routine built to hydrate and prep for the day:

the order matters: cleanser first to clear buildup, then hydration layers while skin is still damp (that's when they absorb best), then sunscreen last. skip the azelaic if you're not using it yet—just cleanse, hydrate, moisturize, sunscreen and you're solid.

products.name: The Ordinary Azelaic Acid Suspension 10%
products.description: Azelaic acid for redness, PIH, and mild rosacea — pregnancy-safe.

products.name: CeraVe Hydrating Facial Cleanser
products.description: Ceramide-based, fragrance-free, non-stripping — pairs with any active.

items: apply hydrating toner or mist on damp skin
use azelaic acid (optional active for texture)
apply treatment serum (vitamin c for brightness)
